inputTokens.description: Input (prompt) tokens consumed across the journey run.

outputTokens.description: Output (completion) tokens produced across the journey run.

cacheReadTokens.description: Prompt-cache read tokens served across the journey run.

costUsd.description: Optional dollar cost of the journey run.

description:
Token/cost accounting for a journey run (#63). Token counters are int32 (not
int64) to avoid JSON Schema string coercion; `costUsd` is an optional float.
